JavascriptRequired: JavaScript is required to use this tool!
errorDisconnect: The connection to the server has failed. Please refresh this page or file an issue in GitHub.
errorTooLarge: File too large to upload directly! You may want to {{#a}}request a server-side upload{{/a}}.
detailsDescription: Below is the full error message that was returned by the server. If you believe this error is due to a bug in video2commons, please include this error message in your bug report.
createServerSide: Create server-side upload ticket in one go (recommended)
taskDone: Your task is done. You may find your upload at {{#a}}{{/a}}.
datecategory-audio-error-format: The format of the date must be "Audio files of YYYY".
datecategory-error-future-year: The year must not be in the future.
datecategory-error-invalid-date: The date must be a real date in the past.
datecategory-help:
Optional: Set the date category of the file if you know when it was originally created. If you don't know, leave this blank.

The format of the date must be: $1.
datecategory-video-error-format: The format of the date must be "Videos of YYYY" or "Videos taken on YYYY-MM-DD".
youtubewarning: YouTube downloads may fail due to bot detection. This typically happens when YouTube's rate limits are exceeded. If this happens, wait 1-2 hours before retrying.
notesplaylists: Playlists will not be processed correctly. Some sites (such as Youku and Comedy Central) make use of multipart videos, interpreted as playlists, and will not be processed correctly either.
notesuncheck: If the media does not include video or audio tracks, please uncheck the corresponding checkboxes; otherwise conversion may fail, even if the format is free.
notessubtitles: If 'Import subtitles' is checked, subtitles will be imported, excluding auto-generated ones.
noteslicensing: Only upload {{#a}}#fl|freely licensed{{/a}} or {{#a}}#pd|public domain{{/a}} content. {{#a}}#fu|Fair use{{/a}} is not allowed on Wikimedia Commons.
extensionmsg: The file extension set above is used if and only if the video is in a non-free format, which requires transcoding. Videos in free formats will keep their extensions.
confirmmsg: Please confirm the task or click 'Back' to change the parameters. By clicking 'Confirm', the task will be submitted and executed. Due to technical restrictions, a task cannot be easily aborted once it is submitted.
generic-ratelimit-error: The file cannot be downloaded due to rate limiting. Please try again in 1-3 hours.
out-of-memory-error: The server ran out of memory while processing the file. Please try again, and if this problem persists, please report a bug.
segfault-error: An internal error was encountered while processing the file. Please try again, and if this problem persists, please report a bug.
title-forbidden-error: The title of the file is not allowed. Please upload the file using a different title. Check the {{#a}}file naming policy{{/a}} for more information.
unsupported-format-error: The file could not be encoded. This may be caused by unsupported formats or incompatible settings. Please report a bug so we can investigate.
video-not-found-error: The file cannot be found at the provided URL. Please create a new task with a different URL.
youtube-bot-error: The video cannot be downloaded due to YouTube's bot detection. Please try again in 1-3 hours.
youtube-private-error: The video cannot be downloaded from YouTube as it is marked as private.
youtube-ratelimit-error: The video cannot be downloaded from YouTube due to rate limiting. Please try again in 1-3 hours.
